Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-16 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum ranker shows TNGX dominating the top spot with an exceptionally rare composite score of 97.5, driven by extraordinary returns across all timeframes—most notably a 861% one-year return and a 173.8% six-month gain—while maintaining perfect SMA positioning (above all four major moving averages) and exceptional ratio consistency with 4 of 5 timeframe ratios passing. TYRA follows in second place with a more moderate but still impressive 244% one-year return and 195% six-month gain, also posting a high score and crossing all SMA gates. Both securities show strong outperformance versus SPY, QQQ, and IAU across multiple periods, with TNGX's vs_spy spreads particularly wide (839.98% annually), though both show low or weak correlations to major sector ETFs, suggesting they may be driven by idiosyncratic rather than broad market factors. The "clean" momentum signal on TNGX and normal volatility flags on both suggest these aren't momentum extremes fueled by unusual market conditions, but rather sustained genuine outperformance.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
